Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar May-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christopher Scott Rector, Tel. 510.338.3524, defendant/claimant appearing on his own behalf.

No other appearance. Defendant Christopher Rector's Claim Of Exemption is granted in the amount of $2,512. This amount is to be released to the judgment debtor. Balance to be paid to the judgment creditor. Order signed. Pro Tem Judge: Ernst Halperin, not reported.
